parameters.query:
SELECT
  MAX(CASE WHEN key = 'email_delivery_mode' THEN value END) AS email_delivery_mode,
  MAX(CASE WHEN key = 'email_test_recipient' THEN value END) AS email_test_recipient,
  MAX(CASE WHEN key = 'email_sender_name' THEN value END) AS email_sender_name,
  MAX(CASE WHEN key = 'email_reply_to' THEN value END) AS email_reply_to,
  MAX(CASE WHEN key = 'email_signature_template_key' THEN value END) AS email_signature_template_key,
  MAX(CASE WHEN key = 'n8n_base_url' THEN value END) AS n8n_base_url
FROM public.global_settings
WHERE key IN ('email_delivery_mode', 'email_test_recipient', 'email_sender_name', 'email_reply_to', 'email_signature_template_key', 'n8n_base_url');
